Serialized Form

  • Package model.accident

    • Class model.accident.Accident

      class Accident extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • description
          String description
          Short description of the accident situation
        • patient
          Patient patient
          Patient involved in the accident
        • type
          AccidentType type
          Type of medical accident

    • Class model.accident.Patient

      class Patient extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • age
          int age
        • bodyTemperature
          double bodyTemperature
        • bpm
          int bpm
        • condition
          String condition
        • conscious
          boolean conscious
        • name
          String name

  • Package model.agent

    • Class model.agent.Agent

      class Agent extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • agentType
          AgentType agentType
        • currentEffectiveDistance
          double currentEffectiveDistance
        • currentPath
          List<Node> currentPath
          Current computed path followed by the agent
        • currentPosition
          Node currentPosition
          Current position node
        • destination
          Node destination
          Target destination node
        • id
          int id
          Unique identifier of the agent
        • initialPosition
          Node initialPosition
          Initial position of the agent when it was created
        • nextNode
          Node nextNode
          Next node the agent is heading to
        • nodeWaitCycles
          int nodeWaitCycles
          Remaining congestion wait cycles for this agent at its current node
        • pathIndex
          int pathIndex
          Index of the next node to reach in the current path
        • progressOnEdge
          double progressOnEdge
          Progress on the current edge (distance already traveled)
        • speed
          double speed
          Maximum movement speed
        • state
          State state
          Current state of the agent

    • Class model.agent.CargoAgent

      class CargoAgent extends Agent implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • cargoWeight
          double cargoWeight
          Weight of the cargo carried by this agent

    • Class model.agent.FastAgent

      class FastAgent extends Agent implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

    • Class model.agent.NormalAgent

      class NormalAgent extends Agent implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

    • Class model.agent.PriorityAgent

      class PriorityAgent extends Agent implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • priorityLevel
          int priorityLevel
          Priority level of this agent

    • Class model.agent.SlowAgent

      class SlowAgent extends Agent implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

  • Package model.graph

    • Class model.graph.Edge

      class Edge extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • agents
          List<Agent> agents
          List of agents currently on this edge
        • capacity
          int capacity
          Maximum number of agents allowed on this edge
        • destination
          Node destination
          Destination node of the edge
        • distance
          double distance
          Distance or cost associated with this edge
        • oriented
          boolean oriented
          Indicates whether the edge is directed
        • passCount
          int passCount
          Number of agents that have completed this edge
        • passedSpeedSum
          double passedSpeedSum
          Sum of speeds of agents that completed this edge
        • source
          Node source
          Source node of the edge
        • type
          EdgeType type
          Road type used to determine movement speed on this edge

    • Class model.graph.Graph

      class Graph extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • adjacencyList
          Map<Node,List<Edge>> adjacencyList
          Adjacency list representation of the graph

    • Class model.graph.Node

      class Node extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • accident
          Accident accident
        • blocked
          boolean blocked
          Indicates whether the node is blocked (not accessible)
        • congestionWaitCycles
          int congestionWaitCycles
          Remaining congestion wait cycles (set to 2 when overcrowded)
        • id
          int id
          Unique identifier of the node
        • maxCapacity
          int maxCapacity
          Maximum number of agents allowed in this node
        • name
          String name
        • noPriorityAgents
          List<Agent> noPriorityAgents
          List of no-priority agents currently located on this node
        • passCount
          int passCount
        • passedSpeedSum
          double passedSpeedSum
        • priorityAgents
          List<Agent> priorityAgents
          List of priority agents currently located on this node
        • type
          NodeType type
        • x
          Double x
          X coordinate used for rendering the node
        • y
          Double y
          Y coordinate used for rendering the node
